name: file-tier-nav
description: Navigate between related files by tier (alpha/beta/gamma/delta) using regex from→to rules. No default keybindings or rules; configure in settings and keybindings.json.

commands.title: File Tier Nav: Open by tier

fileTierNav.tiers.description: Tier definitions (e.g. alpha, beta, gamma, delta). Each keybind invokes the command with one tier id.

key.description: Example keybinding for README/docs only; extension does not use this.

fileTierNav.rules.description: Rules: from (regex) → to (template with $1, $2…). Only rules whose tier matches the invoked tier run.

from.description: Regexes to match current file path (workspace-relative). Try each in order, first match wins; its capture groups are used for to.

to.description: Target path templates. Use $1, $2, … for capture groups. Try each in order, open first that exists; if none and create: true, create the last.

tier.description: Tier id this rule belongs to.

create.description: If true, create the target file if it does not exist and open it.

replace.description: If true, open in the current tab (replacing the active editor). Default: open in new tab (preview: false) or focus existing.

split.description: If true, open in a new column (split editor).
